def negative_pandas_read_csv_without_dtypes():
    rule_id = "pandas_read_csv_without_dtypes"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "pd.read_csv(...) calls omit dtype hints, forcing extra inference work."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
